method.conditions: heated at 175°C for 30 min in oil bath until colorless solid changed to orange liquid

applications.performance: Af-GQDs exhibited strong fluorescence intensity and it could be effectively quenched by the latter due to photo-induced electron transfer.
applications.comparative_advantage: a great promise in the development of a sensitive fluorescence sensor for the determination of copper ions.

applications.performance: Analysis of Cu2+ uptake in HeLa and HeLa/DDP cells
applications.comparative_advantage: Capable of monitoring Cu2+ into tumor cells

feedback.label: Good
